name: play-together-gba
description: A self-hosted Game Boy Advance emulator with shared family saves. See SPEC.md.

scripts.build: npm --workspace client run build && npm --workspace server run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace shared run typecheck && npm --workspace client run typecheck && npm --workspace server run typecheck
scripts.itest: npx -y firebase-tools emulators:exec --project demo-gba --only auth,database "npm --workspace client run test:itest"
scripts.rules:test: npx -y firebase-tools emulators:exec --project demo-gba --only auth,database "npm --workspace client run test:itest"
